voice_observations.caption_text:
Introducing 𝐑𝐄𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐌 𝐑𝐗, the newest feature at our Innovation Hub🔥🧘

Blending immersive technology with dynamic reformer training, this is a smarter, more interactive way to move, strengthen, and challenge your body. ⚡️

Head to our Oasis Mall branch and experience it for yourself. 💪
#𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘𝐀𝐓𝐅𝐈𝐓𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐅𝐈𝐑𝐒𝐓 ❤️
#FitnessFirstMe #Aboveandbeyond #GoFurtherWithFitnessFirst
voice_observations.hook_text: Introducing 𝐑𝐄𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐌 𝐑𝐗, the newest feature
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Hi guys, Tali here, Pilates Master Trainer at Fitness First. Today we are at OAC Centre to introduce you a new feature in our Innovation Hub. Meet ReformRX and this is the next level of your Pilates experience and I'm going to show you why. First, as you can see, the bed is bigger and has new features that's going to allow you to have your workout in a safe and effective way. The carriage has this handle on the side where you can put your hands, it will become much easier while we slide through the planks and guess what, even without the springs it gives you a lot of stability. Regarding the resistance we have the springs in the front, four colours, one green, one white, one red and one blue, you just press to attach to the carriage. For the foot bar we have this pedal we can press to lift and adjust for different levels and we also can slide it through the spine of the bed until the last position, how cool is this? And of course the screen, we have so many options here, instructors, male, female, strength or flexibility workouts, you just need to select on the right side, you have the length of the cast, the type, if it's beginner, intermediate, advanced and of course the focus, duration, anything that you want to do, you can do it here. Now you know Reform Rx and you know where to find it, here at Oasis Centre Mall, I can't wait to see you and to know what is your experience about this beautiful equipment.
